review_text: Clean amenities with great pressure and hotwater showers. Plenty of space .
Great place to stay at..

The park boasts to be set on 55 acres while most of it is unusable due to any wet weather. Large, deep pot holes throughout entire park along roads.
Lady upon check-in was not very polite/friendly.

As the days went by we realised more and more wrong with the place. We were also lied to about the length of stay we could have here.

Stayed here for location close to Townsville.Park is overgrown and neglected,site was overgrown barely accessible for the mud.Internal roads are a disgrace,potholes and washed away.It rained and had no way but walk through ankle deep water to amenities block.Amenities were clean and serviceable.The had lots of ramshackle shacks in park and looked terrible.
Had police banging on door at 1.15am in the morning looking for someone.
I would assume managers could  have informed them.
The park camp kitchen was filthy and bbq unusable.
Owners need to upgrade park to justify $42.00 per night and do some maintenance.
Big site's grass and concrete drive thru site's site's big enough for buses medical centre 2min down on the road servo about 5min from park and 15min to shops Cole's
Nice clean cabin. Friendly staff. Takeaway and dine in options just up the road.

Reasonably priced park with large site's.  Friendly staff and very helpful.  Bit more geared around permanent tenants, but is close to Townsville . Amenities are good and clean and plenty of.....has a dump point.
Bit shabby in parts (semi-permanent resident’s sites) and a fair bit of highway traffic noise but reasonable facilities and plenty of large flat grassed sites.
Great showers.

Lovely place to stop
Kids and I enjoyed our time
Friendly and helpful Staff , thank you so much ☺️

A very nice park but current management have allowed the roads to be almost completely destroyed it is a shame but is currently in an extremely dangerous and unusable condition they seem not to give a dam.
Lovely place with fresh water , mens toilet has only 1 toilet , sorry thought I should edit and wish to ask to upgrade the amenities, could even put showers with a meter

Mainly permanents in this park and right on the highway.  Friendly Managers which was nice and big sites - old toilets but clean.  We liked it because it was an overnight stop for us which was great because it was easy to get in and out of and you avoid Townsville.
We have a van on site everyone is nice and chatty
We were upgraded to a very nice cabin, thank you. It was  clean, fresh and a comfy bed.
Old park but huge sites great place
The best caravan park in Townsville by far. Loved the service and friendliness offered by Samantha. Great host. We will stay again! Thank you!
It's fine for a overnight stop, close to the highway, toilets and showers are fine, the kitchen could be better, but is still alright.
Inexpensive though not well organised

After walking into another caravan park who spoke to me very rude and told me I was an idiot for thinking a caravan park would take on a family with 3 cars I'm ridiculous leave and don't come back here then when i left come out starting on my son as he turned in the gravel swearing at him at which i was there and he did not spin his wheels I went up the road further to bluewater caravan park and they were nice and understanding they had made my day feel alot better as I was thinking why did we move to townsville if people are like this here we have no home at the moment but the management has been so accommodating highly recommended for any one who comes this way I come from a family of campers who will be visiting me at some point I will reccomend this place thankyou again
Loved this place, spacious camping bays, easy distance from shopping centres, hardware stores and service stations.

The park looks like it's home to the locals but this isn't to discourage staying there. The lady at reception was very friendly. Our site was nice and big for our camper trailer. Amenities were older but clean. The park was quiet and the grass was green, it looks like its maintained.

Well, after 3000 km driving in my van I thought I treat myself to a motel room for the last night before home. It's a donger and totally overpriced for $117. But the worse is a loud motor/generator whatever noise in the background. It occasionally stops and I tried to go to sleep in that time. But as soon as I drift off it starts again. It's 2am and haven't slept a wink. Can't wait for daylight to get out of here and get home to Cairns.
Good stay, nice place and friendly staff
Great prices.clean,tidy, sharp turn into park from south
Nice clean, quiet even 500m from Highway, permanent sites available

Great place for an overnight stop. Off the highway , north of Townsville. Good value at $37.80 for 2 of us and camper. Very clean facilities, good pressure, hot
showers. Friendly new owners have made great improvements to this older park. Large pitches, but not a lot with shade. It’s a dog friendly park most were on lead. But we saw a couple of dogs wandering off lead, no owners in sight. Overall, a good experience   Would definite return.

Off the highway north of Townsville,  a quiet place to rest up. An older park but the facilities are exceptionally clean and plenty of them. Water quality is good,and sites are huge.there is a small pool. The park is well looked after and watered around camp sites. Everyone we have dealt with has been lovely and very helpful. We would totally recommend Bluewater.
Great value, quiet and relaxing.
Phone directions completely confused and inaccurate. Piece of garbage. Back to hard copy maps !!

Out of the way. Fantastic down to earth camp. No frills but has everything you need including plenty of space. Camp kitchen had fridge freezer two kettle's toaster hot water soap.  Set up next to kitchen. Friendly locals. Thank you.
Loved the showers thanku
Keep on driving.  🚗

Thanks Sharon for helping out an on the
road traveller passing through.
Needs heaps of work not good value for the money.

This is an older park that had been run down by the previous owners. There's now a new owner/manager intent on giving the park a new lease on life, they've already upgraded one of the amenities blocks and plan big improvements park-wide. We stayed here because we couldn't get powered sites at short notice any closer to town, but in future we'll come straight here.
Great drive thru sites lots of room facilities very clean and well designed concrete blocks powered sites staff friendly only down side is traffic noise
Fantastic venue provided by Sam & Chey at Bluewater Caravan Park. They have great facilities and are always friendly and willing to help out. Great spot to visit in Townsville!!

Pros: Cheaper than Townsville accommodation, at $117 for 2 people for a 'motel' unit. Has private kitchenette and bathroom. Shower water pressure was good. Has double bed, TV, 2 stovetops, bar fridge, kitchen sink, microwave and basic amenities. There was air con. Staff was friendly.

Cons: Was ~20 minute drive to Townsville. Many ants in the bathroom despite us keeping all the food away inside the fridge - had to deal with the ants ourselves. Shower curtain was too short, so a lot of water splashed out flooding the floor outside. Rooms were quite small and humid.

Verdict: Okay for a one night stay, wouldn't want to stay for too long.

Unfortunately facilities need some TLC one block in ladies locks don’t work on toilets or they jam and you are almost stuck in there. |Roof leaking in out her block and lots of broken tiles at sink. Hot shower ok. Boom gate doesn’t work so anyone can access off the highway. It’s a large flat paddock area not as lush as advertised. No bins around just an overflowing skip down new  red the office. There are sacks around for cans.  Is 30 from Townsville but that’s along the highway at 100km.| The sites are big and plenty of space. A short stopover point is what this park is best for as right on the highway , or if your working up this way and need cheep accomodation.| Most of park looks like time stopped when the people moved in.

A very nice place to stay, so quite, has everything you need in such a reasonable price. Very big so everyone can have their little area and privacy. Clean amenities.

Would recommend
Very friendly staff. So much room here for caravans, camper trailers,  RVs and tents. Flat and nice grassy sites. Super clean amenities. Hot showers with lots of water pressure. Just a great place.
Surprisingly large park. On North side of Townsville. Head start for trip to Cairns. Need some maintenance in the amenities.
